# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
    skipDefaultCheckout(true)
    timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
  }

  parameters {
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma/whitespace/newline-separated list of artifact URLs (s3://, http(s)://, artifactory URL). Can include optional destination path via "URL -> /dest/path".')
    string(name: 'TARGET_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma/whitespace/newline-separated list of target servers (host or user@host).')
    string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'prod-ssh', description: 'Jenkins SSH Username with Private Key credential ID for connecting to servers.')
    string(name: 'DEPLOY_BASE_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp', description: 'Base directory on target server.')
    string(name: 'RELEASES_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases', description: 'Releases directory on target server.')
    string(name: 'CURRENT_SYMLINK', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/current', description: 'Symlink path pointing to current release.')
    booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, do not change servers; only show actions.')
    booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deployment.')
    string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'systemd service name to restart (if enabled).')
    booleanParam(name: 'RUN_HEALTHCHECK', defaultValue: true, description: 'Run healthcheck after deployment.')
    string(name: 'HEALTHCHECK_URL', defaultValue: 'http://localhost:8080/health', description: 'Healthcheck URL on target server (curl -fsS).')
    choice(name: 'DOWNLOAD_TOOL', choices: ['AUTO', 'CURL', 'WGET', 'AWSCLI'], description: 'Preferred downloader. AUTO picks based on URL and available tools.')
    choice(name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY', choices: ['ATOMIC_SYMLINK', 'INPLACE'], description: 'ATOMIC_SYMLINK: upload to new release dir then flip symlink. INPLACE: copy into base dir.')
    booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_SHA256', defaultValue: false, description: 'If true, verify sha256 for artifacts (requires providing checksums).')
    text(name: 'SHA256_SUMS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional sha256 sums. Format: "<sha256> <filename>" per line (filename matches downloaded basename). Used when VERIFY_SHA256=true.')
    booleanParam(name: 'FAIL_ON_MISSING_TOOL', defaultValue: true, description: 'Fail if required tools are missing (curl/wget/aws). If false, best-effort.')
    booleanParam(name: 'CONFIRM_PROD', defaultValue: true, description: 'Require explicit production confirmation.')
    string(name: 'PROD_CONFIRM_TEXT', defaultValue: 'DEPLOY', description: 'Type this value into PROD_CONFIRM_INPUT to confirm.')
    string(name: 'PROD_CONFIRM_INPUT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Must match PROD_CONFIRM_TEXT when CONFIRM_PROD=true.')
  }

  environment {
    WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy"
    ARTIFACT_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy/artifacts"
    MANIFEST_FILE = "${env.WORKSPACE}/_deploy/manifest.json"
  }

  stages {
    stage('Validate') {
      steps {
        script {
          def confirm = (params.CONFIRM_PROD ? (params.PROD_CONFIRM_INPUT?.trim() == params.PROD_CONFIRM_TEXT?.trim()) : true)
          if (!confirm) {
            error("Production confirmation failed. Set PROD_CONFIRM_INPUT to '${params.PROD_CONFIRM_TEXT}'.")
          }

          def urls = parseLinesCsv(params.ARTIFACT_URLS)
          if (!urls || urls.isEmpty()) error('ARTIFACT_URLS is empty.')

          def servers = parseLinesCsv(params.TARGET_SERVERS)
          if (!servers || servers.isEmpty()) error('TARGET_SERVERS is empty.')

          if (params.VERIFY_SHA256) {
            def sums = parseSha256Sums(params.SHA256_SUMS)
            if (sums.isEmpty()) error('VERIFY_SHA256=true but SHA256_SUMS is empty or invalid.')
          }

          currentBuild.description = "Artifacts: ${urls.size()} | Servers: ${servers.size()} | DryRun: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare Workspace') {
      steps {
        script {
          sh "rm -rf '${env.WORK_DIR}' && mkdir -p '${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}'"
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Download Artifacts') {
      steps {
        script {
          def entries = parseArtifactEntries(params.ARTIFACT_URLS)
          writeFile file: env.MANIFEST_FILE, text: groovy.json.JsonOutput.prettyPrint(groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson([
            build: [
              job: env.JOB_NAME,
              buildNumber: env.BUILD_NUMBER,
              buildUrl: env.BUILD_URL,
              timestamp: new Date().toString()
            ],
            artifacts: entries.collect { e ->
              [ url: e.url, destPath: e.destPath, basename: e.basename ]
            }
          ]))

          def shaMap = params.VERIFY_SHA256 ? parseSha256Sums(params.SHA256_SUMS) : [:]

          entries.each { e ->
            def outPath = "${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}/${e.basename}"
            downloadArtifact(e.url, outPath, params.DOWNLOAD_TOOL, params.FAIL_ON_MISSING_TOOL)
            sh "test -s '${outPath}'"

            if (params.VERIFY_SHA256) {
              def expected = shaMap[e.basename]
              if (!expected) error("Missing sha256 for '${e.basename}' in SHA256_SUMS.")
              verifySha256(outPath, expected)
            }
          }

          stash name: 'downloaded-artifacts', includes: "_deploy/**"
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      steps {
        script {
          def servers = parseLinesCsv(params.TARGET_SERVERS)
          def entries = parseArtifactEntries(params.ARTIFACT_URLS)

          def releaseId = new Date().format("yyyyMMddHHmmss", TimeZone.getTimeZone('UTC')) + "-b${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
          def remoteReleaseDir = "${params.RELEASES_DIR}/${releaseId}"

          def perServer = [:]
          servers.each { srv ->
            def server = srv.trim()
            if (!server) return
            perServer["deploy:${server}"] = {
              node(env.NODE_NAME) {
                unstash 'downloaded-artifacts'
                sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                  def remote = server.contains('@') ? server : "deploy@${server}"

                  def mkdirCmd = (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'ATOMIC_SYMLINK') ?
                    "mkdir -p '${remoteReleaseDir}'" :
                    "mkdir -p '${params.DEPLOY_BASE_DIR}'"

                  remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun(mkdirCmd, params.DRY_RUN))

                  if (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY == 'ATOMIC_SYMLINK') {
                    entries.each { e ->
                      def localFile = "${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}/${e.basename}"
                      def remotePath = resolveRemotePath(remoteReleaseDir, e.destPath, e.basename)
                      def remoteDir = remotePath.contains('/') ? remotePath.substring(0, remotePath.lastIndexOf('/')) : remoteReleaseDir
                      remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun("mkdir -p '${remoteDir}'", params.DRY_RUN))
                      if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                        remoteScpTo(remote, localFile, remotePath)
                      } else {
                        echo "[DRY_RUN] scp '${localFile}' -> '${remote}:${remotePath}'"
                      }
                    }

                    remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun("ln -sfn '${remoteReleaseDir}' '${params.CURRENT_SYMLINK}'", params.DRY_RUN))

                  } else { // INPLACE
                    entries.each { e ->
                      def localFile = "${env.ARTIFACT_DIR}/${e.basename}"
                      def remotePath = resolveRemotePath(params.DEPLOY_BASE_DIR, e.destPath, e.basename)
                      def remoteDir = remotePath.contains('/') ? remotePath.substring(0, remotePath.lastIndexOf('/')) : params.DEPLOY_BASE_DIR
                      remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun("mkdir -p '${remoteDir}'", params.DRY_RUN))
                      if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                        remoteScpTo(remote, localFile, remotePath)
                      } else {
                        echo "[DRY_RUN] scp '${localFile}' -> '${remote}:${remotePath}'"
                      }
                    }
                  }

                  if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
                    def svcCmd = "sudo systemctl restart '${params.SERVICE_NAME}'"
                    remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun(svcCmd, params.DRY_RUN))
                  }

                  if (params.RUN_HEALTHCHECK) {
                    def hcCmd = "curl -fsS --max-time 10 '${params.HEALTHCHECK_URL}' >/dev/null"
                    remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun(hcCmd, params.DRY_RUN))
                  }

                  remoteSh(remote, wrapDryRun("echo 'Deployed ${releaseId} from ${env.BUILD_URL}'", params.DRY_RUN))
                }
              }
            }
          }

          parallel perServer
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      script {
        archiveArtifacts artifacts: "_deploy/**", fingerprint: true, allowEmptyArchive: true
      }
      cleanWs deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true
    }
  }
}

@NonCPS
def parseLinesCsv(String s) {
  if (s == null) return []
  return s
    .split(/[\n\r, ]+/)
    .collect { it.trim() }
    .findAll { it }
}

@NonCPS
def parseArtifactEntries(String s) {
  def tokens = []
  if (s == null) return tokens
  def raw = s.split(/[\n\r]+/)
  raw.each { line ->
    def ln = line?.trim()
    if (!ln) return
    if (ln.contains(',')) {
      ln.split(',').each { part ->
        def p = part.trim()
        if (p) tokens << p
      }
    } else if (ln.contains(' ')) {
      ln.split(/\s+/).each { part ->
        def p = part.trim()
        if (p) tokens << p
      }
    } else {
      tokens << ln
    }
  }

  def entries = []
  tokens.each { t ->
    def url = t
    def dest = null
    if (t.contains('->')) {
      def parts = t.split(/\s*->\s*/, 2)
      url = parts[0].trim()
      dest = parts[1].trim()
      if (!dest.startsWith('/')) {
        dest = '/' + dest
      }
    }
    def basename = deriveBasename(url)
    entries << [url: url, destPath: dest, basename: basename]
  }
  return entries
}

@NonCPS
def deriveBasename(String url) {
  def u = url.trim()
  if (u.startsWith('s3://')) {
    def p = u.replaceFirst(/^s3:\/\//, '')
    def idx = p.lastIndexOf('/')
    return (idx >= 0) ? p.substring(idx + 1) : p
  }
  def qIdx = u.indexOf('?')
  if (qIdx >= 0) u = u.substring(0, qIdx)
  def hashIdx = u.indexOf('#')
  if (hashIdx >= 0) u = u.substring(0, hashIdx)
  def idx = u.lastIndexOf('/')
  def name = (idx >= 0) ? u.substring(idx + 1) : u
  if (!name) name = "artifact.bin"
  return name
}

def downloadArtifact(String url, String outPath, String preferredTool, boolean failOnMissingTool) {
  def tool = preferredTool ?: 'AUTO'

  def isS3 = url.startsWith('s3://')
  def downloader = tool

  if (tool == 'AUTO') {
    if (isS3) downloader = 'AWSCLI'
    else downloader = 'CURL'
  }

  if (downloader == 'AWSCLI') {
    if (!hasCmd('aws')) {
      if (failOnMissingTool) error("aws cli not found but required to download: ${url}")
      downloader = 'CURL'
    }
  }

  if (downloader == 'CURL') {
    if (!hasCmd('curl')) {
      if (failOnMissingTool) error("curl not found but required to download: ${url}")
      downloader = 'WGET'
    }
  }

  if (downloader == 'WGET') {
    if (!hasCmd('wget')) {
      if (failOnMissingTool) error("wget not found but required to download: ${url}")
      error("No downloader available to download: ${url}")
    }
  }

  if (downloader == 'AWSCLI') {
    sh "aws s3 cp '${escapeSingle(url)}' '${escapeSingle(outPath)}' --no-progress"
    return
  }

  if (downloader == 'CURL') {
    sh "curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 1800 -o '${escapeSingle(outPath)}' '${escapeSingle(url)}'"
    return
  }

  if (downloader == 'WGET') {
    sh "wget -O '${escapeSingle(outPath)}' --tries=3 --timeout=30 '${escapeSingle(url)}'"
    return
  }

  error("Unsupported DOWNLOAD_TOOL: ${preferredTool}")
}

def verifySha256(String filePath, String expected) {
  if (hasCmd('sha256sum')) {
    sh "echo '${escapeSingle(expected)}  ${escapeSingle(filePath)}' | sha256sum -c -"
  } else if (hasCmd('shasum')) {
    sh "echo '${escapeSingle(expected)}  ${escapeSingle(filePath)}' | shasum -a 256 -c -"
  } else {
    error("No sha256 verifier found (sha256sum/shasum).")
  }
}

@NonCPS
def parseSha256Sums(String s) {
  def map = [:]
  if (!s) return map
  s.split(/[\n\r]+/).each { line ->
    def ln = line?.trim()
    if (!ln) return
    if (ln.startsWith('#')) return
    def m = (ln =~ /^([a-fA-F0-9]{64})\s+(.+)$/)
    if (m.matches()) {
      def sum = m[0][1].toLowerCase()
      def name = m[0][2].trim()
      if (name.contains('/')) name = name.substring(name.lastIndexOf('/') + 1)
      map[name] = sum
    }
  }
  return map
}

@NonCPS
def resolveRemotePath(String base, String destPath, String basename) {
  if (destPath == null || destPath.trim().isEmpty()) {
    return "${base}/${basename}"
  }
  def p = destPath.trim()
  if (p.endsWith('/')) {
    return "${base}${p}${basename}"
  }
  return "${base}${p}"
}

def remoteSh(String remote, String cmd) {
  sh "ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${escapeSingle(remote)}' ${singleQuote(cmd)}"
}

def remoteScpTo(String remote, String localFile, String remotePath) {
  sh "scp -o BatchMode=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${escapeSingle(localFile)}' '${escapeSingle(remote)}:${escapeSingle(remotePath)}'"
}

def wrapDryRun(String cmd, boolean dryRun) {
  if (!dryRun) return cmd
  return "echo '[DRY_RUN] ${escapeForEcho(cmd)}'"
}

def hasCmd(String cmd) {
  return sh(script: "command -v '${escapeSingle(cmd)}' >/dev/null 2>&1", returnStatus: true) == 0
}

@NonCPS
def singleQuote(String s) {
  return "'${s.replace("'", "'\"'\"'")}'"
}

@NonCPS
def escapeSingle(String s) {
  return s.replace("'", "'\"'\"'")
}

@NonCPS
def escapeForEcho(String s) {
  return s.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("'", "\\'")
}
